title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Acuite Ratings Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Acuite Ratings Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Acuite Ratings Holdings Services in Rajkot is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Acuite Ratings Holdings Services:
Acuite Ratings Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Acuite Ratings Holdings Services!
